CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO WESTINGHOUSE ELECTRIC COMPANY LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-02-2012 AT 6:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANG, GURSON S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTINGHOUSE ELECTRIC COMPANY LLC EATON CORP D.B.A. CUTLER HAMMER PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST WESTINGHOUSE(CBS) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE THREE YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS RAN ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-02-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
